series_metadata.series_title: Monthly Consolidated Transactions by Spending Authority Codes
series_metadata.series_description: Monthly compilation of Daily Transaction Register for an Institution, produced by Office of Budget and Management.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years, then destroy, provided audited by Auditor of State and receipt of report if no federal funds are involved, retain an addition one (1) year, Paper: Wastepaper
